electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 27 Hz low-frequency limit (-10 dB) with [SYVA SUB_100]; 29 Hz with [SYVA SUB_200]. Subwoofer extension element for the Syva system; upper limit set by preset (100 Hz with [SYVA SUB_100]).
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 4: 128 dB with [SYVA SUB_100], 130 dB with [SYVA SUB_200].
electroacoustic.directivity: Omnidirectional (subwoofer); no directivity rating specified. Operates as a passive radiating LF/infra extension element.
electroacoustic.components: 1 x 12" high-excursion LF driver built on a KS28 woofer motor; bass-reflex enclosure with L-Vents.

operating_modes: SE (single-ended, one channel per enclosure on LA2Xi)
BTL (bridged, doubles per-channel capacity on LA2Xi)
amplification.preset_note: [SYVA SUB_100] sets a 100 Hz upper limit with polarity reversed to optimize acoustic summation with Syva / Syva Low. [SYVA SUB_200] yields a slightly higher LF limit (29 Hz) for higher max SPL (130 dB). All routed mono (one input feeds all outputs).

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point speakON (NL4) IN connector; LF carried on speakON points 1+/1-
connection.autoconnect: AutoConnect pass-through plate routes audio and power when Syva or Syva Low is stacked on top (LF on AutoConnect points 1+/1-); do not use the speakON connector simultaneously with AutoConnect.
connection.labeling: Carries an enclosure label to distinguish it from Syva Low when both subwoofers are in a rig.

physical.cabinet: First-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; steel grille with anti-corrosion coating and acoustically neutral 3D fabric; fine-grain dark grey-brown (Pantone 426C) finish, available in RAL colors.

modes: Used as a podium base under Syva or Syva Low (AutoConnect)
rigging_accessories: Syva Base (baseplate for Syva / Syva Low / Syva Sub)
deployment.rigging_note: When grouping subwoofers that are not side by side, keep adjacent acoustic centers within 1.7 m for a 100 Hz upper-limit configuration and apply geometric delays. No pre-alignment delay is needed for the Syva system itself.

usage: Infra-low-frequency extension for the Syva colinear-source system, pushing usable bandwidth down to 27 Hz to add weight below what Syva Low covers.
Each cabinet uses one amplifier channel; pack up to 12 on an LA12X, 16 on an LA7.16i, 4 on an LA4X, or 4 (SE) / 2 (BTL) on an LA2Xi.
L-Acoustics recommends a ratio of 2 Syva Sub per 1 Syva Low plus 1 Syva, giving roughly 12 dB of low-frequency contour reinforcement.
Load the [SYVA SUB_100] preset for normal use - it bands the sub to 100 Hz and inverts polarity for clean summation; use [SYVA SUB_200] when you need slightly more max SPL.
Doubles as a stable podium base: stack Syva or Syva Low on top and let AutoConnect carry both audio and power - never patch the speakON IN while AutoConnect is engaged.
Place sub cabinets side by side where possible; if spread out, keep acoustic centers within 1.7 m and add geometric delays per the configuration.
source_manual: Syva Owner's Manual (EN) - covers Syva, Syva Low, and Syva Sub
